distance: #The distance from the projectile, positive number forward
drift: #How much ship side movement is inherited
velocityIn: #The initial movement speed of the node backward. Note that if it is greater than 0, it means backward.
velocityOut: #The final movement speed of the node backwards, and the accumulation will produce a distortion effect, which must be combined with the subsequent rotation setting to take effect. The greater the vertical rotation, the more distorted it will be.
rotationOut: #The final vertical rotation speed of the texture
randomRotation: #Random direction of rotation of the first two items
